title: Why I never trust fully generated Code
summary: JavaScript Mastery presents a perspective on the risks and limitations of relying on fully AI-generated code without verification. The content addresses concerns developers should have when using code generation tools.
writeup: JavaScript Mastery argues against trusting fully AI-generated code without verification, laying out the risks and limitations of leaning on code generation tools as-is. The takeaway is that generated output requires developer review rather than blind acceptance. The framing situates this within broader concerns about AI safety in everyday development workflows.
